PVT Trim

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x4
Size:
0x4
Source:
pvt_rf.rdl

Description

Trimming control signals for gain and offset calibration.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:14] reserved2 rw 0x0 -
[13:8] cfg_trimo rw 0x0 cfg_trimo
[7:5] reserved1 rw 0x0 -
[4:0] cfg_trimg rw 0x0 cfg_trimg

Field Descriptions

cfg_trimo - cfg_trimo

PVT offset trim control signal.

cfg_trimg - cfg_trimg

PVT gain trim control signal.
